title: Hitu Songu Lyrics Sakalakala Vallavan Appatakkar Song Lyrics
singerName: Manasi MM, Monissha MM, Ramya Nambeesan, Simbu
stanzas:
Song: Hitu Song
Singer(s): STR, Ramya Nambeesan, M.M.Manasi & M.M.Monissha
Music: Thaman S

Aama naanum ethanayo party ku poiruken
vandhiruken Aadiruen Paadiruken
Aana indha partya pola paarthadhilla
Enna pola aatampoda Yaarum illaye

Hittu song mama idhu hittu song maama
Kooda neeyum vandhu oru kutthu podu maama

Anju paise patthu paise vada naanu
Kaaka pola thookikittu poda neenu
Onnum mattum vachikuren unna naanu

Hey nila nila odi vaa nu nee paadu
Nillamal odi varum unnodu
Yellarum pogalaamey honeymoonu

Hey Indiavin map pola ennudaya shape paaru
Neeyum sokki nirpa
Vellakaaran pola neeyum Velayathaan parka pora
Neeyum sokka veipa
Ada sembaruthi katta pola ginnu nu dhan nikuriey
Yellathayum valachi putta

Hittu song dhan de idhu hittu song dhan de
Kooda neeyum ninnu oru kutthu poda vaa de

Hittu song mama idhu hittu song maama
Kooda neeyum vandhu oru kutthu podu maama

Anju paise patthu paise vada naanu
Kaaka pola thookikittu poda neenu
Onnum mattum vachikuren unna naanu

Penne un azhagu vandhu enna kolludhu
E pe co sattam inga enna pannudhu

Hey enna pola azhagu ponna pethuvittadhu
Appa Amma senja thappu enna panradhu

Un dupatta vil Paai virichu
Thoonga naanum parkuren

Gym body paarthu naanum aadi putten da
Un jodi aaga naanum aasa patten da

Hey Kannadi un udambu paarthuputten de
Ayyayo gapula dhan maatikitten de

Ada sembaruthi katta pola ginnu nu dhan nikuriey
Yellathayum valachi putta

Hittu song mama idhu hittu song maama
Kooda kooda neeyum vandhu oru kutthu podu maama

Hittu song dhan de idhu hittu song dhan de
Kooda neeyum ninnu oru kutthu poda vaa de vaa de

ABCD paapa paatu da
Gummunu dhan nikuraale Taata kaatu da
Taata kaatu da Taata kaatu da (2 times)

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song is a lively celebration of fun and partying, encouraging listeners to join in the festivities.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In Sakalakala Vallavan Appatakkar, the song is featured during a party scene, highlighting the characters' enjoyment and camaraderie.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the talented voices of Manasi MM, Monissha MM, Ramya Nambeesan, and Simbu.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Hitu Song was composed by Thaman S.

When was the song released?

The song was released on August 1, 2015.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Hitu Song from Sakalakala Vallavan Appatakkar is a vibrant and energetic dance number that encapsulates the spirit of celebration. It showcases the joy of partying with friends and the carefree attitude of youth. The lively beats and catchy lyrics evoke feelings of happiness and excitement, making it a perfect anthem for any festive occasion. This track not only highlights the talents of its singers but also serves as a reminder of the joy found in togetherness.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Hitu Song from Sakalakala Vallavan Appatakkar is an electrifying dance number that brings together the vibrant voices of Manasi MM, Monissha MM, Ramya Nambeesan, and Simbu. With Thaman S's catchy beats, this song is sure to get everyone on their feet and into the party spirit. Experience the joy and energy of this track that perfectly captures the essence of celebration!
stanzaMeanings: Yes, I too have come to this party. I am here, I am dancing. But I haven't seen a party like this. No one is dancing like me.
This is a hit song, uncle. You should also come and dance a little, uncle.
I have five coins and ten coins, but I am like a crow, taking them away. I am keeping you aside, just like that.
Hey moon, come running and sing. Everyone will come for a honeymoon without stopping.
Hey, look at my shape like an Indian map. You stand like a statue. You are going to show off like a white man. You are going to show off. Just like a flower, I will make everything bloom.
This is a hit song, uncle. You should also come and dance a little, uncle.
This is a hit song, uncle. You should also come and dance a little, uncle.
I have five coins and ten coins, but I am like a crow, taking them away. I am keeping you aside, just like that.
Your beauty is captivating me. What is this law doing here?
Hey, what is this? They have given birth to a beauty like me. What mistake did my parents make?
Your scarf is flying. I am watching while I sleep.
I have built a gym body. I have also hoped to be your partner.
Hey, I have looked at your body in the mirror. Oh no, I have gained weight.
Just like a flower, I will make everything bloom.
This is a hit song, uncle. You should also come and dance a little, uncle.
This is a hit song, this is a hit song. You should also come and dance a little, come on, come on.
ABCD, sing a little song. I am just enjoying. Show me, show me, show me (2 times).
ABCD, sing a little song. I am just enjoying. Show me (5 times).
